title: andropogon columbiensis
intro: Andropogon columbiensis, also known as East Indian thyme or False thyme, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Andropogon columbiensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
